TIER: 2 (STRONG moat / BBB investment-grade equivalent)

TYPE: REALESTATE — Industrial-park land bank (LOCATION moat family: IDC/NTC/DTD analog, NARROW→borderline WIDE on Long Thanh airport catalyst)

ENTRY: WAIT / no-buy at current price. PB 2.02 with pb_z +1.35 = >1 SD expensive vs own 5Y; GPM has trended up 33→40% (cycle peak, not a dislocation). No oversold setup — only enter on a panic dip toward PB ~1.5 (where it traded Q1-2025) or a clean pb_z<0.

RISK1: Land-bank exhaustion / lumpy growth — only ~26 ha leasable land remains (89-94% occupied). The location moat is real but the *runway is short*; once Long Thanh IP fills, recurring rental income continues but new-lease profit growth stalls until the company secures the next phase/parcel. Secondary: liquidity 0.46bn/day is microscopic — cannot size or exit cleanly.

VERDICT: HOLD-quality watchlist name, not a buy here. Genuine STRONG location moat (scarce licensed Dong Nai land adjacent to the new Long Thanh airport) with bank-clean balance sheet (RealLev 0.33, ROIC_Min5Y 10.2%, ROE_Min5Y 16.7%), but the stock is fully-to-richly valued (pb_z +1.35) and the leasable runway is nearly gone (~26 ha). Tag confirms moat=STRONG/rating=2; entry discipline = wait for panic or next-phase land catalyst.

DOSSIER:
- Asset: Long Thanh IP, 483 ha total / ~323 ha industrial land; as of Apr-2025 ~297 ha leased, only ~26 ha vacant (≈92% of industrial land let; 89.4% occupancy Jan-2024 across 126 projects, >$1.3bn FDI). Runway is thin.
- Location moat = scarce HOSE-licensed Dong Nai land beside the new Long Thanh International Airport — a structural premium catalyst (logistics/satellite-industry pull), same scarcity dynamic as IDC/NTC/DTD.
- Income mix: lumpy one-off land-lease revenue + a recurring layer (ready-built factory leasing, 3 standardized designs ~3,750–5,650 m²) → smooths but doesn't replace land-sale upside once full.
- Quality: ROIC_Min5Y 10.2% / ROE_Min5Y 16.7% through-cycle, GPM rising 33%→40% (2024Q3→2026Q1), RealLev only 0.33 — moat-grade durability, conservatively financed.
- Capital signal: sold out 1.77m treasury shares and guides FY profit ~148bn VND while accelerating infrastructure capex — management deploying into the next industrial-infra phase (the re-runway bet to watch).
- Valuation: PB 2.02 / pb_z +1.35 — >1 SD rich vs own 5Y history; DY 0.0 in dataset (no current yield support). Re-rating already partly priced.
- Trap check: micro-cap liquidity (0.46bn/day) makes this position-size constrained and exit-risky regardless of thesis.

SOURCES (accessed [REDACTED]05):
- [Long Thanh Industrial Zone — Sonadezi](https://sonadezi.com.vn/vi/en/projects/long-thanh-industrial-zone/)
- [Dự án KCN Long Thành — Sonadezi Long Thành](https://szl.com.vn/du_an/khu-cong-nghiep-long-thanh/)

TIER: 1
TYPE: LOCATION/REGULATORY moat (airport-concession duty-free + lounge — exclusive captive-traveler franchise at TSN)
ENTRY: Wait/Watchlist — PB 2.31 (pb_z −0.03, mid-range vs own 5Y; not a dip) + sub-1bn/day liquidity makes this a patient-accumulation name, not a buy-now. Re-rate trigger = Long Thanh duty-free rights award.
RISK1: Concession renewal / Long Thanh allocation risk — TSN is the cash cow today; if SASCO fails to win equivalent duty-free + lounge rights at Long Thanh (commercial launch June 2026), terminal traffic migrates and the location moat erodes. Compounded by micro-cap illiquidity (0.41bn/day → hard to exit).

VERDICT: STRONG moat / TIER 1 confirmed — quality is real once you strip the COVID scar; accumulate on weakness, size tiny for liquidity.

DOSSIER:
- COVID-SCAR confirmed by the floor split: ROE_Min5Y +2.0% / ROIC (5Y-implied) negative are dragged by the 2020-21 airport-retail collapse; the 3Y floors are healthy and RISING — ROE_Min3Y +14.3% → +19.2%, ROIC_Min3Y +8.6% → +11.2% over the last year. Use the 3Y floor for the real read (classic ACV/SAS COVID lesson).
- Earnings fully recovered: GPM expanding 56% → 65% across 2024Q2→2026Q1; NP YoY positive and strong in most recent quarters (+37.6% latest, +170% in 2025Q4) — duty-free + lounge volumes back near/above pre-COVID.
- Moat = LOCATION/REGULATORY: exclusive duty-free (20+ stalls, 12,000+ SKUs in the international transit zone) and lounge concessions at Tan Son Nhat, the captive HCMC gateway; IPP / Johnathan Hanh Nguyen retail backing reinforces the franchise.
- 2025 = record revenue/profit/state-budget contribution per the FY2025 annual report — recovery thesis is realized, not speculative.
- Long Thanh optionality (commercial launch June 2026): SASCO's stated 2027-28 plan is to strengthen TSN T1/T2/T3 and gradually transfer T2 services to Long Thanh — a re-rating catalyst IF it secures equivalent duty-free/lounge rights there; the key uncertainty to monitor.

(1) BQ: bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=prettyjson 'SELECT t.ticker,t.quarter,ROUND(t.ROE_Min5Y,3) ROE_Min5Y,ROUND(t.ROIC_Min3Y,3) ROIC_Min3Y,ROUND(t.ROE_Min3Y,3) ROE_Min3Y,ROUND(t.GPM_P0,3) GPM,ROUND(t.NP_R,3) NP_YoY,ROUND(t.PB,2) PB FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS t WHERE t.ticker="SAS" QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC)<=8 ORDER BY t.time DESC' (env ~/.bashrc) — note 3Y floors (post-COVID) vs 5Y.
(2) 1 web search: SASCO duty-free TSN concession, Long Thanh rights, travel recovery.
Return EXACTLY: TIER/TYPE/ENTRY/RISK1/VERDICT/DOSSIER(5-7 lines: note COVID-scar, use 3Y floor)/SOURCES(access [REDACTED]05).

content.text:
TIER: 1
TYPE: LOCATION/REGULATORY moat (airport-concession duty-free + lounge — exclusive captive-traveler franchise at TSN)
ENTRY: Wait/Watchlist — PB 2.31 (pb_z −0.03, mid-range vs own 5Y; not a dip) + sub-1bn/day liquidity makes this a patient-accumulation name, not a buy-now. Re-rate trigger = Long Thanh duty-free rights award.
RISK1: Concession renewal / Long Thanh allocation risk — TSN is the cash cow today; if SASCO fails to win equivalent duty-free + lounge rights at Long Thanh (commercial launch June 2026), terminal traffic migrates and the location moat erodes. Compounded by micro-cap illiquidity (0.41bn/day → hard to exit).

VERDICT: STRONG moat / TIER 1 confirmed — quality is real once you strip the COVID scar; accumulate on weakness, size tiny for liquidity.

DOSSIER:
- COVID-SCAR confirmed by the floor split: ROE_Min5Y +2.0% / ROIC (5Y-implied) negative are dragged by the 2020-21 airport-retail collapse; the 3Y floors are healthy and RISING — ROE_Min3Y +14.3% → +19.2%, ROIC_Min3Y +8.6% → +11.2% over the last year. Use the 3Y floor for the real read (classic ACV/SAS COVID lesson).
- Earnings fully recovered: GPM expanding 56% → 65% across 2024Q2→2026Q1; NP YoY positive and strong in most recent quarters (+37.6% latest, +170% in 2025Q4) — duty-free + lounge volumes back near/above pre-COVID.
- Moat = LOCATION/REGULATORY: exclusive duty-free (20+ stalls, 12,000+ SKUs in the international transit zone) and lounge concessions at Tan Son Nhat, the captive HCMC gateway; IPP / Johnathan Hanh Nguyen retail backing reinforces the franchise.
- 2025 = record revenue/profit/state-budget contribution per the FY2025 annual report — recovery thesis is realized, not speculative.
- Long Thanh optionality (commercial launch June 2026): SASCO's stated 2027-28 plan is to strengthen TSN T1/T2/T3 and gradually transfer T2 services to Long Thanh — a re-rating catalyst IF it secures equivalent duty-free/lounge rights there; the key uncertainty to monitor.
- Caveats: PB 2.31 is not cheap (pb_z ~0; no dislocation), and 0.41bn/day liquidity caps position size — execution and exit are the practical constraints, not quality.

SOURCES (accessed [REDACTED]05):
- [SASCO Duty Free](https://www.sasco.com.vn/en/posts/duty-free-store)
- [SASCO FY2025 Annual Report (PDF)](https://assets.sasco.com.vn/assets/uploads/files/260417005444317-sasco-annual-report-2025_compressed.pdf)
- [Long Thanh commercial launch June 2026 — TravelMole](https://www.travelmole.com/news/vietnam-authorities-finally-take-a-decision-on-air-traffic-distribution-between-tan-son-nhat-and-long-thanh-airports-in-saigon/)
- [SASCO privatised — Moodie Davitt Report](https://moodiedavittreport.com/vietnamese-airport-services-and-retail-company-sasco-privatised/)

aiTitle: Analyze competitive moat for 8L modeled companies

content.text:
TIER: 1 (STRONG moat, blue-chip micro-cap)

TYPE: Brand + Distribution moat — OTC herbal/traditional-medicine franchise

ENTRY: WAIT / fair (PB 2.07, pb_z ~−0.02 = priced at own 5Y mean; no dislocation, no margin of safety). Accumulate only on a panic dip toward PB <1.6 / pb_z <−1.

RISK1: Liquidity trap — 0.36bn VND/day turnover is near-untradeable for any size; position must be tiny and exit can be impossible in a drawdown. (Secondary: EU-GMP generic rivals + lumpy quarterly NP swings.)

VERDICT: HOLD/WATCH — genuine wide-moat compounder (through-cycle ROIC_Min5Y 17.8%, ROE_Min5Y 16.8%, GPM steady 51–55%), but fully valued and structurally illiquid. Quality is real; the entry and the float are not. Buy only on washout.

DOSSIER:
- Moat = brand + distribution, validated by archetype: Traphaco is Vietnam's #1 Eastern/traditional (Dong y) producer; flagship OTC brands Boganic (hepatobiliary), Hoat Huyet Duong Nao, Tottri, Cebraton consistently hold top market share — consumer-loyalty/repeat-purchase brands, stickier than commodity generics.
- Vertical supply moat: 5 GACP-WHO domestic herb-cultivation zones + own extracting plant + 3 GMP-WHO factories = raw-material control rivals can't quickly replicate; top-5 pharma by revenue overall.
- Profitability confirms durability: ROIC_Min5Y 17.8% (a worst-of-5Y floor, i.e. through-cycle), GPM band 51.2–55.0% across 8 quarters — pricing power consistent, not a one-off.
- Earnings are lumpy: NP_YoY swings hard (2026Q1 +47.7%, 2025Q1 −22.7%, 2024Q3 −41.5%) while revenue grows steadily (+8.5% 9M-2025); volatility is timing/base-effect, not franchise erosion.
- Valuation neutral: PB 2.07, pb_z ≈ 0 → trading at its own historical average; no cheapness signal, no overvaluation flag.
- Competition = OPC + EU-GMP upgraders chipping at the modern-pharma flank; herbal-OTC core remains defended by brand equity. Daewoong/Magbi strategic backing supports modernization.
- Disqualifier for sizing: 0.36bn/day liquidity — eval as quality-watchlist, not a deployable book position.

SOURCES (accessed [REDACTED]05):
- [Traphaco — About / company profile](https://www.traphaco.com.vn/en/about-traphaco.html)
- [Traphaco: Sustainable development via a green value chain (VIR)](https://vir.com.vn/traphaco-sustainable-development-via-a-green-value-chain-106990.html)
- [Traphaco focuses on modern medicines / EU-GMP factories (VIR)](https://vir.com.vn/traphaco-focuses-on-modern-medicines-and-invests-in-eu-gmp-factories-110392.html)
- [Herbal/Traditional Products in Vietnam — Euromonitor](https://www.euromonitor.com/herbal-traditional-products-in-vietnam/report)
- [Top 10 Leading Pharmaceutical Companies and Brands in Vietnam 2025 (InvestVietnam)](https://blog.investvietnam.co/top-10-leading-pharmaceutical-companies-and-brands-in-vietnam-2025/)

Key correction from web search: Vietnam's MOIT **extended** the duty (effective June 16, 2026) — it did NOT lapse. This materially changes the protection thesis, but the regime is still WEAK (world price crash + smuggling). Here is the tag.

---

**SLS — Son La Sugar (HNX)** — 5f_cyclical | accessed [REDACTED]05

**TIER:** 2 (CYCLICAL lens — protected mid-quality cyclical, not a brand moat)
**TYPE:** Protected cane-sugar producer / NARROW moat — policy-protected, weak-regime (LOCATION: Son La, northern VN highland cane belt; COST: integrated grower-miller, GPM ~24% compressing from ~40%, mid-tier on the cane cost curve, protection-dependent not low-cost)
**ENTRY:** WAIT — do not initiate despite PB 0.82 / pb_z −1.71
**RISK1:** Regime WEAK — world sugar price crash + smuggling glut crushing domestic ASP; NP collapsing (NP_YoY 2026Q1 −82%, GPM 40%→24% over 5 quarters); thin liquidity 0.30bn/day (un-exitable in size)
**VERDICT:** AVOID / WAIT — cheap-but-falling-knife; protected-but-weak = classic sugar value-trap per the TREND rule

**DOSSIER (sugar WEAK regime + buy-timing AVOID):**
1. Sugar uses the TREND rule, which INVERTS the cyclical contrarian rule: buy GOOD-regime dips, AVOID weak-regime — troughs are value-traps because the structural deficit/protection makes trends persist (per sugar_cyclical_trend memory).
2. Regime NOW = WEAK: world price crashed, domestic ASP undercut by smuggled sugar sold below cost; SLS GPM compressed 40.3% (2024Q4) → 24.0% (2026Q1) and NP_YoY −82% — the down-leg is confirmed and accelerating, not bottoming.
3. **Protection correction (web, [REDACTED]05):** the Thai anti-dumping duty did NOT expire — MOIT's review **extended** the 42.99% AD + 4.65% CVD (≈47.64%) effective [REDACTED]. So the cheap-import legal channel stays closed; the real demand leak is smuggling, not tariff lapse. Protection = NARROW moat intact, but it is not enough to offset a global price collapse.
4. Quant quality is genuinely high for sugar (ROIC_Min5Y 18.6%, ROE_Min5Y 21.9%, no-frills balance sheet) and valuation is washed out (PB 0.82, pb_z −1.71 = very cheap vs own 5Y) — but in the TREND framework cheap + weak-regime is precisely the avoid quadrant.
5. Liquidity 0.30bn/day is the hard gate: even if a buy thesis existed, position sizing is impractical and exit is illiquid — micro-cap-only.
6. Capex overhang (An Khe capacity raise to 25k t/d, 135MW biomass, new ethanol plant) keeps near-term earnings depressed and FCF negative through the trough.
7. Trigger to revisit: regime flip to GOOD (world price recovery + smuggling crackdown lifting domestic ASP) WITH valuation still cheap → then the high-ROIC quality pays in a GOOD-regime dip. Until then: WAIT.

**SOURCES (accessed [REDACTED]05):**
- [ChiniMandi — Vietnam extends anti-dumping duties on imported sugar](https://www.chinimandi.com/vietnam-extends-anti-dumping-duties-on-imported-sugar-tightens-measures-against-trade-diversion/)
- [Czapp — Vietnam Keeps Anti-Dumping Duties on Thai Sugar](https://www.czapp.com/analyst-insights/vietnam-keeps-anti-dumping-duties-on-thai-sugar/)
- [ChiniMandi — Vietnam sugar industry faces crisis amid price crash and smuggling surge](https://www.chinimandi.com/vietnam-sugar-industry-faces-crisis-amid-price-crash-and-smuggling-surge/)
- [Czapp — SLS 2Q2026 EPS/revenue & dim outlook (capex projects)](https://www.czapp.com/analyst-insights/vietnam-keeps-anti-dumping-duties-on-thai-sugar-2/)
- [S&P Global — Vietnam 47.64% anti-circumvention duty (original Aug-2022 ruling)](https://www.spglobal.com/commodityinsights/en/market-insights/latest-news/agriculture/080222-vietnam-imposes-4764-anti-circumvention-duty-on-sugar-imports-from-5-asean-countries)

---

Note for the record: the brief assumed the duty expires 15-Jun-2026, but the web search shows MOIT extended it (effective 16-Jun-2026). I corrected the dossier accordingly — protection stays intact, so the AVOID call now rests on the world-price/smuggling demand shock rather than a tariff-lapse import threat. The TREND-rule WAIT verdict is unchanged either way.

CSV,NARROW,COST/SCALE,M,"Dominant southern-VN caustic-soda/chlor-alkali producer (sticky industrial demand, ROIC_Min5Y 14.3% decent floor) but commodity price-taker; caustic soda BEARISH 2026 ($690-740/MT range, alumina demand soft + Chinese chlor-alkali capacity glut), NP_YoY -18% margin squeeze; expensive now (PE 15, pb_z +0.57) = NOT a contrarian buy. FIXED [REDACTED]05: COMMODITY_MAP now maps CSV->caustic_soda (own NaOH cycle, AMPLE/glut), was wrongly dap",[REDACTED]05,5f_cyclical

-QNS,NARROW,BRAND/COST,M,"Hybrid — ~half Vinasoy soymilk (branded defensive = the durable floor, ROE_Min5Y 17.7%) + ~half sugar (cyclical, protected); sugar regime WEAK now (world price low + Thai anti-dumping duty 47.64% EXPIRES 15-Jun-2026 = dumping risk returns) → sugar TREND-rule (inverts contrarian) says avoid weak-regime; soymilk brand + cheap valuation (pb_z -0.53, PE 8.8) cushion the sugar headwind",[REDACTED]05,5f_cyclical

+QNS,NARROW,BRAND/COST,M,"Hybrid — ~half Vinasoy soymilk (branded defensive = the durable floor, ROE_Min5Y 17.7%) + ~half sugar (cyclical, protected); sugar regime WEAK now (world price crash + smuggling glut; Thai anti-dumping duty 47.64% was EXTENDED eff 16-Jun-2026 NOT expired → import protection intact, real headwind = world price + smuggling) → sugar TREND-rule (inverts contrarian) says avoid weak-regime; soymilk brand + cheap valuation (pb_z -0.53, PE 8.8) cushion the sugar headwind",[REDACTED]05,5f_cyclical

SCS,NARROW,REGULATORY/LOCATION,M,"Air-cargo terminal duopoly at Tan Son Nhat (only SCS vs TCS) = elite concession economics (ROIC_Min5Y 36%, GPM 78%) but single-asset pinned to one aging airport; Long Thanh (opens ~2026) re-tenders cargo rights via ACV — if SCS loses LTIA Terminal-2 concession, intl volume migrates off TSN (binary regulatory event caps WIDE); growth decelerating post-recovery + CIT-incentive expiry",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet

TLG,WIDE,BRAND/DISTRIBUTION,L,"Vietnam #1 stationery (~60% pen share, brands Thien Long/Bizner/FlexOffice) — asymmetric brand+3800-POS distribution+scale a new entrant can't buy (validated by Kokuyo JP paying ~4700bn for >65% control); durable WIDE (ROIC_Min5Y 16.6%, GPM rising 45->50%). #1 risk: secular handwriting/paper decline + shrinking school-age cohort slowly erode core TAM. Entry L (PB ~2.0/pb_z +1.9 expensive, thin liq)",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet

NTP,NARROW,BRAND/DISTRIBUTION,L,"Northern-VN #1 plastic pipe (BMP=south) — 50yr brand + entrenched dealer/installer network = real regional duopoly moat (GPM flat ~31% across 8Q = pass-through pricing, NOT a resin windfall, earnings volume-driven); but REGIONAL not national + Hoa Sen/Dekko competition + 80-85% imported PVC resin price-taker (HDPE+45%/PVC+31% YTD 2026 margin headwind). Entry L (pb_z +1.31 expensive)",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet

aiTitle: Analyze competitive moat for 8L modeled companies

input.old_string: pb_z -1.61 cheap vs own history; heavy dividend payer",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
input.new_string:
pb_z -1.61 cheap vs own history; heavy dividend payer",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
VLB,NARROW,LOCATION,M,"Bien Hoa Building Materials stone quarry (NNC/DHA archetype) — 6 Dong Nai quarries (Tan Cang cluster, primary stone source for Long Thanh airport/Ring Road 3), ROIC_Min5Y 22.6% strong through-cycle, low debt. The ROE_Min5Y -6.2% is a pre-2018 special-dividend/equity-shrink artifact NOT capital destruction (2018+ ROE all 20-43%). Finite reserves + province license-renewal ceiling; PB 2.75-2.85 rich + 0.9bn liq = watchlist quality, buy panic dips only",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
DHG,WIDE,BRAND/DISTRIBUTION,L,"Vietnam's #1 domestic pharma — widest distribution moat (~30,000 OTC pharmacies, 3,546 chain stores, 3,200 hospitals, 34 branches) + 40yr brand + 2 Japan-GMP lines, Taisho (JP) 51% parent; durable WIDE (ROIC_Min5Y 19.4%, GPM 44->48%). BUT mature/low-growth (RevYoY ~flat, moat protects margins not compounding) + generic price competition; entry L (PB 2.79/pb_z +0.05 no discount, 0.76bn liq)",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
HTI,NARROW,REGULATORY,L,"IDICO BOT toll road (An Suong-An Lac, NH1 HCMC gateway) = exclusive tolling concession BUT FINITE/melting asset — toll expires ~Q4-2032/Jan-2033, then reverts to state for FREE (terminal value ~0, only ~6-7yr run-off left); DY=0 (cash services debt, D/E 1.46), PB 0.81 below-book is illusory (wasting concession not perpetuity). Value as declining annuity via run-off DCF only; entry L/avoid",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
NTC,NARROW,LOCATION,M,"Nam Tan Uyen industrial park (Binh Duong FDI corridor) = scarce-licensed-land LOCATION moat (IDC/DTD family); NTU-1&2 100% occupied, growth engine = NTU-3 (346ha, infra done Q4-2026). Headline ROE_Min5Y 26.9% carried by Phuoc Hoa/VRG associate dividends NOT core IP (ROIC_Min5Y only 4.0% = holding-co distortion); lumpy land-recognition; pb_z -1.63 cheap vs own history but 0.6bn liq",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
SGP,NONE,NONE,L,"Quant moat FALSE-POSITIVE — Saigon Port's legacy HCMC river ports (Nha Rong-Khanh Hoi) being SHUT/relocated for urban redevelopment = operating concession being EXTINGUISHED not defended; hollow core (ROIC_Min5Y 3.0%, ROE_Min5Y 6.3%). Real value = riverfront LAND monetization (~1,200bn relocation gain pending since 2018) + distressed Cai Mep JV stakes (SP-PSA/SSIT/CMIT). An asset-play/sum-of-parts, NOT a franchise moat; one broker SELL",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
FOC,NARROW,BRAND,M,"FPT Online (VnExpress = #1 VN news site ~89-127M monthly visits + online ads/games) = audience+brand moat, asset-light high-ROIC (ROIC_Min5Y 13.1%, GPM ~50%) cash machine + big dividend payer. BUT structural ad-share erosion to Big Tech (Google 28%/Meta 19%/TikTok 8.7% rising) — VnExpress holds traffic but premium-news ad pool grows slower than market = secular governor on growth (FPT/erosion pattern) → caps at NARROW; pb_z -0.84",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
SZL,NARROW,LOCATION,M,"Sonadezi Long Thanh industrial park (Dong Nai, beside new Long Thanh airport = premium catalyst) = scarce-land LOCATION moat (IDC/NTC/DTD family), clean B/S (RealLev 0.33, ROIC_Min5Y 10.2%). #1 risk: land-bank nearly EXHAUSTED (~26ha leasable left, ~92% occupied) → new-lease profit growth stalls until next phase secured; PB 2.02/pb_z +1.35 rich (cycle peak not dip)",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
SAS,NARROW,LOCATION/REGULATORY,M,"SASCO airport duty-free + lounges at Tan Son Nhat (IPP/Hanh Nguyen-backed) = exclusive concession/captive-traveler LOCATION moat; ROIC/ROE_Min5Y negative/low are COVID-SCARRED (use 3Y floor: ROE_Min3Y +14->19%, ROIC_Min3Y +9->11% rising) NOT capital destruction; GPM 56->65%, NP recovered. #1 risk: must win equivalent Long Thanh duty-free rights (launch Jun-2026) or TSN traffic migrates; pb_z ~0 fair, 0.41bn liq",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
TRA,NARROW,BRAND/DISTRIBUTION,M,"Traphaco = Vietnam's #1 traditional/herbal OTC pharma (Boganic/Hoat Huyet Duong Nao top share) — brand-loyalty/repeat moat stickier than generics + vertical GACP-WHO herb-supply chain (5 cultivation zones, hard to replicate); durable ROIC_Min5Y 17.8%, GPM 51-55%. High-end NARROW (dominant in a NICHE category, contested at modern-pharma flank by OPC/EU-GMP upgraders); pb_z ~0 fair, 0.36bn liq",[REDACTED]05,5f_validated_compet
SLS,NARROW,LOCATION/COST,M,"Son La Sugar (northern cane belt) = policy-protected cane-sugar producer, integrated grower-miller, high quality for sugar (ROIC_Min5Y 18.6%, ROE_Min5Y 21.9%) BUT commodity price-taker. Sugar regime WEAK now (world price crash + smuggling glut; Thai AD duty 47.64% EXTENDED eff 16-Jun-2026 so import-protection intact, real hit = world price+smuggling) → GPM 40->24%, NP_YoY -82%. Sugar TREND-rule = AVOID weak-regime despite cheap PB 0.82/pb_z -1.71 (falling knife)",[REDACTED]05,5f_cyclical

| **NCT** | NARROW | LOCATION/REG | Noi Bai cargo terminal — elite (ROIC 54%) but **3 handlers** (not duopoly) + ACV favors ACSV | MarketScreener, ALS, Vietstock |

### Batch 2 (liq 0.90 → 0.30 bn/day)
| Ticker | Tier | Type | Archetype & verdict (1-line) | Key sources |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **VLB** | NARROW | LOCATION | Bien Hoa stone quarry (NNC archetype); ROE_Min5Y −6.2% = pre-2018 special-div artifact not capital loss (ROIC 22.6%) | Vietstock, ASEAN Briefing |
| **DHG** ⭐ | **WIDE** | BRAND/DIST | #1 domestic pharma — **30k pharmacies** distribution moat + Taisho 51%; mature/low-growth, entry L | TheInvestor, DHG AR2025 |
| **HTI** | NARROW | REGULATORY | BOT toll road — **finite concession expires ~2032/33** then reverts free (melting annuity, value via run-off DCF) | Vietstock, VietnamPlus |
| **NTC** | NARROW | LOCATION | Nam Tan Uyen IP — NTU-3 catalyst (Q4-2026); ROE carried by Phuoc Hoa associate-div (ROIC core only 4%) | InvestVietnam, Vinahugo |
| **SGP** ⛔ | **NONE** | NONE | Saigon Port FALSE-POS — legacy ports relocating = concession extinguished; land+JV asset-play not franchise (ROIC 3%) | Shinhan, DTTC (broker SELL) |
| **FOC** | NARROW | BRAND | FPT Online/VnExpress #1 news audience moat but **ad-share leaking to Google/Meta/TikTok** (secular governor) | Statista, Similarweb |
| **SZL** | NARROW | LOCATION | Sonadezi Long Thanh IP (by airport) — moat real but **land bank ~26ha left** (growth stalls), PB rich | Sonadezi, Congluan |
| **SAS** | NARROW | LOCATION/REG | SASCO duty-free TSN concession; COVID-scarred (3Y floors healthy); **Long Thanh rights = key catalyst/risk** | SASCO AR2025, TravelMole |
| **TRA** | NARROW | BRAND/DIST | Traphaco #1 herbal-OTC (Boganic) + vertical GACP herb supply; high-end NARROW (niche, modern-pharma flank) | Traphaco, Euromonitor |
| **SLS** | NARROW | LOCATION/COST | Son La Sugar (`5f_cyclical`) — **AVOID**: sugar WEAK regime (world crash+smuggling); ⚠️**Thai AD duty EXTENDED 16-Jun-2026 not expired** | ChiniMandi, Czapp |

> ⚠️ **Correction (batch 2):** the Thai sugar anti-dumping duty (47.64%) was **EXTENDED effective 16-Jun-2026**, NOT expired — earlier QNS/SLS notes that said "expires 15-Jun" were wrong; import protection stays intact, the sugar headwind is world-price crash + smuggling. QNS risk1 corrected in moat_tags.csv.

input.command:
cd "/c/Users/hotro/OneDrive/Pictures/Documents/WorkingClaude" && source ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null
python rank_8l.py >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "rank_8l OK"
python dna_card.py >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "dna_card OK"
python unified_screener.py >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "unified_screener OK"
PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import pandas as pd, csv
# verify a WIDE overlay fired (TLG)
r=pd.read_csv('data/rank_8l.csv')
for tk in ['TLG','DHG']:
    row=r[r.ticker==tk]
    if len(row): print(f'{tk}: moat5f={row.iloc[0].get(\"moat5f\")} _L4_moat={row.iloc[0].get(\"_L4_moat\")}')
# regenerate worklist
df=pd.read_csv('data/rating_8l.csv'); tagged=set()
with open('data/moat_tags.csv',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for x in csv.DictReader(f): tagged.add(x['ticker'].strip().upper())
KEEP={'COMPOUNDER','CYCLICAL','REALESTATE','POWER'}
pool=df[(df.moat=='STRONG')&(df.rating<=2)&(~df.ticker.isin(tagged))&(df.route.isin(KEEP))].copy()
pool['liq_bn']=pool['liq_bn'].fillna(0)
pool=pool.sort_values('liq_bn',ascending=False)
pool[['ticker','route','rating','moat','liq_bn','ROIC_Min5Y','ROE_Min5Y','PB','pb_z']].to_csv('data/moat_5f_candidates.csv',index=False)
print('worklist remaining (all <0.30bn untradeable):', len(pool), '| tagged total:', len(tagged))
"

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: moat_5f_8l_bridge_2026
description: 5F (Porter) qualitative moat → 8L L4 bridge as a GATE (not ranker) + interactive Telegram 2-block DNA/NOW report
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 8aee0eaa-e66c-43a2-9041-8e90dacf35eb
---

**5F ↔ 8L moat bridge + interactive bot report (built [REDACTED]03).** Connects the qualitative
**5F** persona (Porter 5-Forces, `5F.md`, a claude.ai project — assesses industry structure + firm
moat) into the quantitative **8L** ranker. See [[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]] (FA-as-ranker FAILS full-NAV).

**Core decision — moat = GATE/durability multiplier, NOT additive points.** 8L's L4 was only an ROE
proxy, fooled by cyclical high-ROE (DGC ROE 37% looks "STRONG" but 5F reads NARROW cost-position; DRC
no-moat→transient). User insight: *moat is rare + stable over years* → so the tag file is a small,
hand-maintained, ~annual-review **registry**, and look-ahead risk is minimal (a stable structural fact,
not a trading signal). Overlay is intentionally ASYMMETRIC: NONE = big haircut (−16 on a high-ROE+deep-dd
block: L4→3 + buy-fear ×−0.5), WIDE = small bonus (+1.2: L4 floored 12, dislocation ×+0.15, capped at
ceiling 15), NARROW/untagged = no-op. Mainly removes false-positives, doesn't mint points.

**Files built:**
- `moat_5f.py` — schema + `load_moat_tags()` + `apply_moat_overlay()` (knobs at top: WIDE_FLOOR 12,
  NONE_CAP 3, factors +0.15/−0.50). Bounded, backward-compatible (no file → no-op).
- `data/moat_tags.csv` — the registry (cols: ticker,moat_tier WIDE/NARROW/NONE,moat_type,entry,risk1,asof,src).
  Hand-edit (NO intake script — over-engineering for a tiny stable table). Seeded VCS=WIDE, DGC/QTP/NNC=NARROW,
  DRC=NONE from validated 8L_README verdicts. `risk1` = kill-condition to watch (when the stable moat changes).
- `rank_8l.py` — imports overlay, applies in score_row, shows `5F` column. LIVE-ONLY: never wire into
  prodspec backtester (post-hoc/non-point-in-time → look-ahead).
- `dna_card.py` — added `5F-Moat:` line (tier + type + risk1) to bank & compounder branches + CSV cols.

**Interactive Telegram bot — ALREADY EXISTED, do NOT rebuild.** `telegram_8l_bot.py` long-polls
getUpdates, user texts a ticker → `reply_for()`. Upgraded only the renderer via new `dna_report.py`
`build_report(tk)`. **Two-clocks layout** (user's framing): 🧬 DNA (slow/structural — route·engine·
moat+5F+risk1·TAM·margin, from CACHED unified_screener/dna_cards/moat_tags) + ⚡ NOW (live BQ AT QUERY
TIME — price·%chg·pe_z/pb_z·dd·liq·**regime**·rank). Only NOW pays live-query cost; DNA cached (correct,
changes per quarter). Each block stamped with own freshness. Ngũ-Hành regime from `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state`
(state **1=CRISIS 2=BEAR 3=NEUTRAL 4=BULL 5=EX-BULL**, weights 0/20/70/100/130%, cached 5min). Quick-read =
gate-style synthesis (regime+dislocation+moat tier), explicitly "not a buy signal".

**Re-validation via `/competitive-analysis` skill ([REDACTED]05).** Decided to run the deck-skill ONLY on
*claimed* moats (WIDE/NARROW) — NONE names are readable from financials, not worth the qualitative cost
(asymmetry: validate where being wrong is expensive). Full Porter 5F + BQ quant cross-check on all 4
non-NONE names. Outcome: **VCS WIDE→NARROW** (the only tier change) — its WIDE thesis rested on (a) US-ADD-
on-China = a *borrowed* regulatory tailwind now reversing vs Vietnam (20-46% US tariff; US share already
collapsed 80%→25%), and (b) a category facing the **silicosis** existential overhang (Australia banned
engineered stone 2024-07, California pending). DGC/QTP/NNC stayed NARROW (FA already flagged them right):
DGC = cyclical cost edge not through-cycle (ROIC_Min5Y 14% vs peak 29%); QTP entry M→H (PDP8 no-new-coal
barrier) but bond-proxy/terminal-asset; **NNC risk note corrected** — Nui Nho pit expired 2019, real asset
= Mui Tau quarry licensed to 2043 (~20yr, single-asset ~94% rev), NOT near-term depletion. All re-tagged
asof [REDACTED]05 src `5f_validated_compet`. **New artifact: `data/moat_dossiers.md`** = one sourced 5F memo
per claimed-moat name (Porter verdict + quant cross-check + point-in-time URLs) so a moat call can be
defended with evidence later; same LIVE-ONLY rule (never feed backtest). Open follow-up: registry is only
5 hand-picked names — *coverage* (which names deserve a tag) is the bigger gap than *accuracy*, deferred.

**Registry EXPANSION batch-1 contestable ([REDACTED]05).** Pool = quant-moat=STRONG & rating≤2 & route∈{COMPOUNDER,
CYCLICAL,REALESTATE,POWER} (`data/moat_5f_candidates.csv`, 75 left; bank/securities dropped = route-noise). Ran full
5F on the 4 liquid CONTESTABLE names → **all NARROW, all found the quant STRONG tag OVERSTATED**: GMD (port concession
real but Cai Mep cluster overbuilt + ROE inflated by one-off port-stake sale gains, true ROIC 6.5-9%); VGC (only IP
land-bank ~70% GP is moat, glass/materials cyclical drag); VHM (land bank real but RE-dev cyclical+depleting, Land-Law-
2024 cost, leverage→2.2x, ROE episodic + related-party bulk sales as financial income); IDC (IP finite ~3-4yr land +
captive utilities ballast, lumpy recognition). **Systematic finding: GPM-based quant moat OVER-rates asset-heavy/
cyclical/one-off-revenue names → 5F consistently downgrades STRONG→NARROW** (same lesson as VCS WIDE→NARROW). All 4
added to moat_tags.csv + dossiers. NOTE: NARROW = NEUTRAL in overlay (no floor/no haircut) → tagging them does NOT
change rank_8l scores, value is documentation/coverage + preventing future WIDE misreads. ⚠️ **HAG = quant-moat
FALSE-POSITIVE** (STRONG but ROE_Min5Y −7.5% capital-destroyer) — still in worklist, do NOT tag WIDE/STRONG. Remaining
deployable worklist = mostly obvious blue-chips (FPT/VNM/MCH/SAB/FOX/BMP, low 5F value) + cyclicals w/ frameworks
(DRI/QNS/CSV) + KSF. Registry now 9: VCS/DGC/QTP/NNC/GMD/VGC/VHM/IDC=NARROW, DRC=NONE. Pattern holds: **zero WIDE
survives scrutiny so far** — VN mid/large caps rarely have durable wide moats; most "moats" are cyclical/contested/
finite-land. Dossiers: `data/moat_dossiers.md`.

**Registry EXPANSION batch-2 blue-chips + KSF ([REDACTED]05).** User: "có thể mọi thứ thay đổi như VCS rồi" → ran full
5F on the deployable blue-chip pool (don't rubber-stamp; allow WIDE if truly durable). Results — **the user was right,
moats DID change**: **VNM = WIDE** (FIRST WIDE to survive — national 240k-POS distribution + brand + fortress B/S +
22-26% durable ROIC survived a self-inflicted 2024-25 restructuring; but a *trimmed* wide, premium fresh-milk share
leaking to TH True Milk + FTA imports). **FPT = NARROW** (elite realized durability BUT GenAI commoditizing the IT

aiTitle: Analyze competitive moat for 8L modeled companies

content.text:
Hoàn tất và đóng gói sạch. Tổng kết phiên P3:

## Đã làm (20/64 mã P3, ưu tiên thanh khoản)
Xử lý 2 tranche thanh khoản cao nhất; dừng theo quyết định của bạn (44 mã còn lại đều <0.30 tỷ/ngày, untradeable).

**2 WIDE mới** (đều là franchise tiêu dùng/phân phối thống trị — đúng archetype WIDE lặp lại):
- 🏆 **TLG** — văn phòng phẩm #1, ~60% share bút, Kokuyo Nhật thâu tóm >65% xác nhận
- 🏆 **DHG** — dược #1, moat phân phối ~30k nhà thuốc, Taisho 51%

**1 NONE mới:** ⛔ **SGP** — false-positive (cảng di dời = concession bị xoá, land/JV asset-play, ROIC 3%).

Còn lại **NARROW theo archetype** đã chuẩn hoá: cargo-terminal (SCS/NCT), đá (DHA/VLB), cảng (DVP), KCN (NTC/SZL/DTD), nước (BWE), dược (DBD/TRA), BOT (HTI=annuity hữu hạn hết 2032/33), media (FOC=VnExpress, ad-share rò sang Big Tech), tư vấn điện (TV1 + cờ chủ tịch bị bắt), retail sân bay (SAS sẹo-COVID).

## ⚠️ Đính chính quan trọng
**Thuế CBPG đường Thái 47.64% được GIA HẠN (hiệu lực 16-Jun-2026), KHÔNG hết hạn** — note QNS/SLS trước đó sai, đã sửa. Headwind đường thật = giá thế giới sụp + buôn lậu, không phải thuế hết hiệu lực.

## Trạng thái cuối
- **Registry 39 tag: 3 WIDE (VNM/TLG/DHG) · 33 NARROW · 3 NONE (DRC/KSF/SGP)** — [moat_tags.csv](data/moat_tags.csv) + [moat_dossiers.md](data/moat_dossiers.md) (dossier bảng gọn batch 1+2).
- TLG/DHG WIDE overlay verified fire (`_L4_moat=12`); rank_8l/dna/screener refreshed.
- Worklist [moat_5f_candidates.csv](data/moat_5f_candidates.csv) = 45 mã untradeable, parked.
- Memory cập nhật.

## Meta-pattern (sau ~27 mã review toàn diện)
- **~3/27 kiếm được WIDE** — đều là brand+distribution thống trị toàn quốc.
- **Quant GPM-moat over-rate có hệ thống** → 5F hạ STRONG→NARROW.
- **Sàn durability ~0/âm = cờ false-positive đáng tin** (VVS/HAG/KSF/SGP).

Coverage cho mọi tên **deploy được** đã đóng. Hôm sau nếu cần, 45 mã dregs có thể quét nhanh bằng archetype-light, hoặc để nguyên. 🌙
